about.title: About Me
details: I embrace change and innovation, never hesitating to refactor and rebuild when a better solution emerges.
With 5 years in IT planning/operations and data analytics, I handled large-scale data analysis and rule design for an anti-money-laundering (AML/CTF) system.
I used to write SQL logic and hand it to the dev team; now I build the collection, cleansing, and loading pipelines myself as a data engineer.
